title: The Reality Manual
_comment: THE RUNNING ORDER. This list, top to bottom, is the book.
To insert a page between two others, drop its slug in between — no file
is renamed and no other page is touched. To pull a page from the book
without deleting it, move its slug into 'drafts'. Folio numbers and the
page count follow from this order automatically.
Each entry is a filename in /pages, minus the .html.
